markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 601. Motor Vehicle Safety Responsibility Act
##### § 601.170 — Department Acting on Erroneous Information

If the department is given erroneous information relating to a matter covered by Section 601.151 (Applicability of Subchapter) (b)(1) or (b)(2) or to a person’s status as an employee of the United States acting within the scope of the person’s employment, the department shall take appropriate action as provided by this subchapter not later than the 60th day after the date the department receives correct information.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*
